name: Pumpkin Bourbon Raisin Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the raisins and bourbon. Bring to a simmer and remove from heat. Let cool.
2. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, egg yolk, sugar, allspice, ginger, and cinnamon.
3. In a large heavy saucepan, heat half-and-half and cream until hot. Add mixture to eggs in a stream, whisking.
4. Transfer to pan and cook over moderately low heat, stirring, until thickened and registers 175°F on a candy thermometer (do not boil).
5. Remove from heat and transfer custard to metal bowl. Whisk in pumpkin puree and lemon juice.
6. Set bowl in larger bowl of ice and cold water, stir until cold.
7. Freeze mixture in ice cream freezer according to manufacturer's instructions. Transfer to refrigerator compartment and freeze until firm enough to scoop.
Yield: 8 servings
